channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Our favorite budget projector maker has a smart new portable model that folds away into a simple 'ornament' when not in use
item.description: Xgimi's new portable projector hides itself away to take up less shelf or bag space

item.title: Introuvable en France, le prix du Stream Deck OLED va augmenter dans certaines parties du monde
item.description: La console portable de chez Valve, le Steam Deck, va voir sa version OLED monter de prix dans certaines parties du monde à cause de l'augmentation des coûts.

item.title: Here’s the upgrade to my favorite phone camera of last year
item.description: Vivo rarely has a presence at MWC, but this year it bucked that trend in a big way, with the reveal of its next flagship phone, the X300 Ultra, alongside an upgraded telephoto extender lens and professional camera cage. The company isn't ready to launch the handset just yet - or even reveal very many […]

item.title: Beelink's SER10 MAX mini PC, boastingthe insanely powerful AMD Ryzen AI 9 HX 470 and 32GB of DDR5, is $300 off - so act now
item.description: The Beelink SER10 MAX mini PC pairs an AMD Ryzen AI 9 HX 470 processor with 32GB DDR5 memory in a compact chassis, and it’s currently $300 off.

item.title: Scientists Finally Found Something Tardigrades Can’t Survive
item.description: Tardigrades are practically invincible on Earth, so scientists looked to outer space in search of their kryptonite.

item.title: Almost every single PS5 Console Cover available at PlayStation Direct is massively reduced right now
item.description: PS5 Console Covers are the easiest way to personalise your setup — and a bunch of them are heavily discounted at PlayStation Direct right now

item.title: Ce TV 4K QD-Mini LED et 144 Hz chute sous les 500 € et devient une affaire en or
item.description: Un téléviseur QD Mini LED de 55 pouces à moins de 500 euros ? C'est possible grâce à cette offre sur le TCL 55C61K, un TV complet, qui est parfait pour regarder ses films et séries préférés ou même lancer des jeux vidéo.

item.title: Anthropic Improves Feature to Switch From Competitors as Users Call for ChatGPT Boycott
item.description: The updated feature makes importing preferences and context from other LLMs easier as Claude climbs the app charts.

item.title: Finally, someone launched an Android tablet for grownups: Lenovo ThinkTab X11 is a durable, rugged slate that will come with a long warranty and the backing of the world's largest PC maker
item.description: Lenovo unveils ThinkTab X11 rugged Android tablet at MWC 2026 with Snapdragon 7s Gen 3, IP68 durability, and a removable battery design.

item.title: The Supreme Court doesn't care if you want to copyright your AI-generated art
item.description: As AI-generated artwork becomes more commonplace, it still won't be able to be copyrighted, according to US courts. On Monday, the US Supreme Court declined to hear a case about whether an artwork generated with the help of AI can be copyrighted. The refusal means that a lower court's decision to reject the copyright request will stand. The case dates back to 2018 when Stephen Thaler applied for a copyright of an artwork called A Recent Entrance to Paradise. Unlike using ChatGPT or Midjourney, Thaler, a computer scientist, created an AI system that generated the artwork in question. However, t...

item.title: Tech workers urge DOD, Congress to withdraw Anthropic label as a supply chain risk
item.description: Tech workers have signed an open letter urging the Department of War to withdraw its designation of Anthropic as a "supply chain risk" and instead to settle the matter quietly.

item.title: 'No approach is a silver bullet' — UK launches online safety consultation that could see VPNs age-restricted
item.description: The consultation will close on 26 May, with the government's response expected later this summer.

item.title: Les 10 smartphones les plus populaires de la semaine sur Frandroid : les Samsung Galaxy S26 déjà plébiscités
item.description: Pour notre top 10 des smartphones les plus populaires de la semaine sur Frandroid, c'est Samsung qui se taille la part du lion. Les Samsung Galaxy S26 sont dans les premières places de ce classement.

item.title: 'Near-complete shutdown' — Iranians face third day of internet blackout as connectivity hits 1%
item.description: Iranians have been offline for over 48 hours following military strikes, with data showing internet traffic close to zero since February 28. Here's everything we know.

item.title: 390 To d’anciens jeux vidéo vont disparaître à cause de la crise de la RAM
item.description: L'une des plus grosses archives de préservation de jeux vidéo va fermer ses portes.

item.title: Windscribe launches $42,000 animation contest for creative VPN users
item.description: Windscribe is giving away "cold, hard cash" and lifetime VPN subscriptions to animators who can turn its quirky server nicknames into 60-second shorts. Here is how to enter the $42,000 prize pool.

item.title: ‘Hoppers’ Is Easily One of Pixar’s Funniest, Darkest, and Best Movies In Years
item.description: Featuring the voices of Piper Curda, Bobby Moynihan, and Jon Hamm, it opens on March 6.

item.title: State lawmakers have introduced 100+ bills to rein in wealth hoarding
item.description: After the Trump administration passed federal tax cuts for the wealthy, state legislators are looking to address wealth inequality with their own policies. From housing to healthcare and utilities to groceries, rising prices are increasingly making Americans feel burdened by the cost of living.

item.title: Uber CEO Dara Khosrowshahi has an AI clone
item.description: Employees at the company say they created an engineered version of their boss that they can test-run ideas in front of, Khosrowshahi said. While much has been discussed about what the AI takeover means for those in entry-level roles, it seems even CEOs aren’t exempt.

item.title: La fusion HBO Max et Paramount+ pourrait coûter cher aux abonnés
item.description: HBO Max pourrait bien, une fois encore, changer de nom ! Le service de streaming du groupe Warner Bros. Discovery va en effet fusionner avec Paramount+, la plateforme de Paramount Skydance qui a fini par chiper WBD au nez et à la barre de Netflix.

item.title: Nvidia’s spending $4 billion on photonics to stay ahead of the curve in AI
item.description: Nvidia announced on Monday that it's investing $2 billion each into Lumentum and Coherent, which are both developing photonics technology for data centers, like optical transceivers, circuit switches, and lasers, which are used to move data at high speeds over long distances. Their tech could improve energy efficiency, data transfer speeds, and bandwidth in future […]...

item.title: I tested the Samsung Galaxy S26 Ultra — and of course it's the best Android phone ever
item.description: Samsung's new flagship, the Galaxy S26 Ultra, does not disappoint. It's thinner, lighter, and more powerful, even managing to squeeze more exciting photographic and video capabilities out of the same set of cameras.

item.title: Le MacBook Air OLED d’Apple sortirait plus tôt que prévu
item.description: On pensait devoir attendre 2029 pour voir un écran OLED sur un MacBook Air, mais l'attente devrait être (un peu) moins longue.

item.title: The Apple March event is live today — and here's every deal on AirPods, iPads, and MacBooks at Best Buy that I recommend buying
item.description: The Apple March event is live today, which means you can find incredible deals on existing Apple devices at Best Buy, including AirPods, iPads, MacBooks, and more.

item.title: Companies are suing for their tariff money back. ‘Cards Against Humanity’ wants to give some of it to its customers
item.description: The gonzo gaming company is giving refunds to anyone who overpaid for a Cards Against Humanity set since Trump’s tariffs took effect. Will others follow suit? Cards Against Humanity may be known as the tabletop game most likely to make your mom say filthy words over Christmas, but the company’s latest stunt is an act of uncommon decency.

item.title: La nouvelle patronne de Xbox fait ce que personne chez Microsoft n’avait osé faire avant : investir dans le marketing
item.description: Microsoft annonce le recrutement de deux nouveaux directeurs du marketing chez Xbox. Le signe d'un changement de stratégie à venir.

item.title: NASA’s overhauled Artemis mission design will push its lunar landing to 2028
item.description: NASA is streamlining its SLS rocket build and workflow to maintain skill sets, mitigate risk, and eventually launch every year. The moon is just going to have to wait a little longer.

item.title: Nintendo just announced an Indie World Showcase for tomorrow at 9AM ET
item.description: Nintendo has scheduled an Indie World Showcase livestream for tomorrow, March 3, at 9AM ET. The company says this event will include "roughly 15 minutes of news and updates on indie games coming to Nintendo Switch 2 and Nintendo Switch." That's not a whole lot of time, but indie trailers tend to be on the shorter side. We really don't know anything about what Nintendo and its partners could reveal tomorrow. It's entirely possible we'll see something big, like the previously announced Sea of Sorrow DLC for Silksong. More than likely, however, we'll get trailers and updates regarding a spate of ...

item.title: The Analogue Pocket will be back in stock and slightly more expensive
item.description: Analogue announced a restock for its Pocket handheld, but for the second time since late 2021, it's getting a price bump, this time to $239.99. The Pocket will once again be available for preorder through Analogue's website in black or white (the brightly colored versions are always limited editions that sell out fast) starting on […]

item.title: AI is competing with humans to buy DDR5 memory amid the RAMpocalypse caused by its owns appetite for memory
item.description: DDR5 memory listings scraped 50,000 times per hour by bots as AI boom fuels new opportunities for resellers.

item.title: Paramount+ and HBO Max could be merging into a single streaming service
item.description: Paramount Skydance plans to combine Paramount+ and HBO Max into a single streaming service following the completion of its merger with Warner Bros. Discovery. CEO David Ellison confirmed the plan on an investor call Monday, saying the combined platform would serve over 200 million subscribers and position the company to compete with the biggest players in the streaming space. “We think the combined offering, and given the amount of content and what we can do from the tech side, really will put us in a position to be able to compete with the most scaled players in DTC,” Ellison said. It’s not y...

item.title: Xiaomi Pad 8 : la nouvelle grande rivale de l’iPad Air chute déjà sous les 400 €
item.description: Xiaomi marche sur les plates-bandes d'Apple avec sa nouvelle Pad 8, une tablette tactile fine, légère, puissante et ultra-endurante. Cette concurrente de l'iPad Air 11 vient de sortir, mais elle est déjà disponible en promotion à 370,79 euros au lieu de 501 euros chez PC Componentes.

item.title: What is the release date for School Spirits season 3 episode 8 on Paramount+?
item.description: It's safe to say that things aren't looking too rosy for Maddie and Xavier. But when does School Spirits season 3 episode 8 drop on Paramount+?

item.title: HBO Max and Paramount+ are combining into one streaming service
item.description: HBO Max and Paramount+ will be merging into one streaming service this year, Paramount CEO David Ellison has announced.

item.title: Acer Predator Helios Neo laptop for creatives and power users is 20% off and comes with freebies worth $245
item.description: Acer’s Predator Helios Neo pairs an Intel Core Ultra 7 255HX processor with 16GB RAM and a 1TB PCIe SSD in a 16-inch chassis built for demanding creative and AI workloads.

item.title: Magic Keyboard cases for the latest iPad Pro are up to $85 off
item.description: Apple’s Magic Keyboard cases offer a fantastic typing experience, elevating the iPad to laptop status with a large trackpad that offers haptic feedback, and an articulating hinge to help you angle the display just right for your comfort. It’s typically a very pricey accessory, but Woot has new / open-box models selling at great discounts […]

item.title: Apple is anticipating high demand from its March 4 releases
item.description: Apple warned retailers it expects high demand for its new products this week, which include a budget iPhone and new iPad Air.

item.title: X ads ‘Paid Partnership’ labels for creators so they can ditch the hashtags
item.description: The new labels comply with regulations and allow creators to be more transparent with their followers.

item.title: 1 000 km d’autonomie : la batterie solide chinoise Gotion de Volkswagen arriverait plus tôt que prévu avec cette étape majeure
item.description: Le fabricant chinois Gotion High-Tech, soutenu par Volkswagen, annonce avoir bouclé la conception de sa première ligne de production de batteries solides Derrière cette annonce technique se cache une sacrée étape : la transition d’un prototype prometteur vers une industrialisation qui pourrait rebattre les cartes du stockage énergétique mondial.

item.title: HBO Max and Paramount Plus could become one streamer
item.description: Now that Paramount Skydance has become the frontrunner to buy Warner Bros. Discovery, CEO David Ellison wants the two studios' streaming services to become one. During a call with investors on Monday, Paramount Skydance head David Ellison insisted that, if his deal to acquire the entirety of Warner Bros. Discovery for about $110 billion receives […]...

item.title: iPhone 17e vs. iPhone 16e: What's new on Apple's latest $599 handset
item.description: Apple’s most affordable iPhone just got an upgrade, but how does the new iPhone 17e compare to the iPhone 16e? Well, thankfully the price remains the same at $599, which is good news in our current economic climate. An immediate difference you might notice is that one of them now comes in a third color: pink. That’s at least one win for me because I am all for putting more color into tech.There are a few differences under the hood as well, namely that the iPhone 17e is arriving with the A19 chip and double the storage. We’ve already seen what’s possible with an A19 chip in the standard iPhone ...

item.title: L’Oppo Find X9 Ultra va sortir en Europe avec des caractéristiques monstrueuses
item.description: Le constructeur chinois confirme le lancement mondial de son prochain smartphone très haut de gamme. Le Find X9 Ultra sortira bien sur le marché européen et les premières fuites techniques donnent le tournis.

item.title: Hacktivists claim to have hacked Homeland Security to release ICE contract data
item.description: A hacking group called Department of Peace said they hacked a specific office within Homeland Security to protest ICE’s mass deportation campaign, and the companies aiding it.

item.title: The Anker Solix F2000 portable power station is on sale for over half off at Amazon — save $1,150
item.description: The Anker Solix F2000 portable power station is on sale for $849, down from the list price of $1,999. That's a 58% discount.

item.title: Find a gift that kids will actually like
item.description: Toy trends change every year, but we're keeping up.

item.title: WhatsApp officially names Mullvad and Amnezia VPN as go-to tools for bypassing censorship
item.description: WhatsApp has published tips on how to evade restrictions on its service with a VPN, specifically mentioning Mullvad and Amnezia as "well-regarded" providers.

item.title: Best tech gifts, picked by professional gadget nerds
item.description: Mashable reporters curated a list of the year's best tech gifts for any budget. Shop gadgets from Apple, Nintendo, GoPro, and more.

item.title: Lenovo embraces Microsoft Surface Pro design with ThinkPad X13 detachable tablet PC — but with a $2,000 starting price, is it too expensive for its own good?
item.description: Lenovo reveals ThinkPad X13 Detachable at MWC 2026 with Surface-inspired design, Core Ultra Series 3 processors, and a $1,999 starting price.

item.title: War in Iran Spiked Oil Prices. Trump Will Decide How High They Go
item.description: The conflict in the Middle East is driving oil prices up in a midterm year when Americans are already focused on high energy bills.

item.title: LGs ultra-fast 27-inch OLED gaming monitor is 20% off at Amazon
item.description: As of March 2, you can get the LG Ultragear QHD OLED gaming monitor for $799.99, down from $999.99, at Amazon.

item.title: Triple Matinale Tech’ et des grosses news toute la semaine : voici notre programme Twitch
item.description: Notre programme Twitch de la semaine du lundi 2 mars 2026, c’est juste ici : nous vous donnons rendez-vous, mardi, mercredi et jeudi sur notre chaîne Frandroidlive, pour une triple Matinale Tech'.

item.title: Long Covid Is Down, but Not Out, Study Finds
item.description: While most people may recover, millions of Americans still had long covid as of 2024, new research estimates.

item.title: Avis Bouygues Telecom en 2026 : voici les forfaits mobiles et les box internet Bbox de l’opérateur aux meilleures performances réseau
item.description: Bouygues Telecom fait partie des quatre grands opérateurs du marché des télécoms français. Selon les dernières études, il propose le meilleur réseau fibre, le meilleur Wi-Fi ainsi que le meilleur réseau mobile en zone urbaine. Ses offres valent-elles pour autant le coup ? Réponses ici.

item.title: Taser Chess: No, Masochism Is Not a Shortcut to Chess Stardom
item.description: Look, your kinks are your own, but they won't make you better at chess.

item.title: IHOP is giving away free pancakes this week. Here’s when to go
item.description: Diners can score a free short stack of buttermilk pancakes from 7 a.m. to 8 p.m. on March 3 at participating restaurants. If you’re in need of a winter pick-me-up, look no further than your local IHOP. The pancake chain just reminded folks that its yearly National Pancake Day holiday is about to take place. To celebrate, IHOP will be dishing out some free buttermilk pancakes all day long. ...

item.title: The best college graduation gifts for life in the real world
item.description: Hooray for a grad gift they'll actually use.

item.title: Samsung’s Digital Home Key lets you use your phone as your key
item.description: Just days after showing off the Galaxy S26, Samsung is finally rolling out the ability for users to unlock their home with a tap of their phone or by simply approaching their door. The new feature, called Digital Home Key, will live inside Samsung Wallet and is powered by the Aliro smart home standard. Samsung […]

item.title: Everything Apple announced today: iPhone 17e and M4 iPad Air
item.description: Apple has promised a “big week” for the company, which includes an in-person event for press and creators on March 4. But it didn’t exactly wait until Wednesday to get things started. The news started on Monday with the announcements of the iPhone 17e and M4-powered iPad Air.We’ll be updating this roundup throughout the week as we learn exactly what Apple has in store for everyone (though we have a decent idea of what to expect, such as new MacBooks). For now, though, here’s our recap of everything Apple announced on Monday:iPhone 17eAppleApple has spruced up this year’s entry-level iPhone wit...

item.title: Best birthday gift ideas for women
item.description: Best birthday gift ideas for all the women in your life: What to get for your mom, sister, wife, daughter, or best friend. Gift ideas for the ladies in your life that fit every aesthetic, price point, and hobby.

item.title: « Aucune décision n’a été prise » : la réponse cinglante des Pays-Bas à Elon Musk à propos du FSD en Europe
item.description: Elon Musk a récemment affirmé que la conduite autonome de Tesla serait approuvée aux Pays-Bas dès le 20 mars. Une déclaration qui a rapidement fait réagir l'autorité de régulation néerlandaise, chargée d'étudier le dossier, qui vient ralentir les ambitions du patron américain pour le déploiement de la fonction en Europe.

item.title: The best mobile tech announced at MWC 2026 so far
item.description: Mobile World Congress 2026 opened its doors today in Barcelona, Spain, but some of the biggest announcements from the mobile-focused show were already made over the weekend. To make sure you don't miss the best new smartphones, laptops, concepts, and accessories, we're rounding up all the most newsworthy gadgets that have debuted so far at […]
